name: Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. Description of Business Overview Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a preclinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the development of small-molecule therapeutics designed to address upstream biological drivers of aging and age-related diseases rather than treating symptoms alone. Our research strategy targets fundamental cellular processes associated with disease progression and functional decline, including metal-ion dysregulation, oxidative stress, epigenetic regulation, mit...
